universalPatterns.description: Patterns shared by 100% of all analyzed domains

pageRoutingStructure.layoutStrategy: No domain-level layout files; root src/app/layout.tsx only
pageRoutingStructure.middlewareUsage: No middleware.ts found anywhere in the project

responseFlow.apiRoutes: None — no Next.js API routes exist. All data fetching calls external FastAPI backend directly.
responseFlow.orchestrationLayer: Shared axios singleton at src/lib/api.ts; baseURL set from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL. No route handler or server action layer.
responseFlow.definitiveAnswer: All API calls bypass Next.js route handlers entirely. The singleton axios client in src/lib/api.ts is the only orchestration layer.

componentConventions.directoryStructure: Flat: src/components/ComponentName.tsx — no subdirectory per component
componentConventions.exportPattern: default export for all page and component files
componentConventions.componentStructure: Functional components only; no class components, no forwardRef, no memo
componentConventions.propsTypeDefinition: TypeScript interface for props (e.g., interface Props { ... })
componentConventions.stylingApproach: Inline style={{ }} objects exclusively in domain pages; root/home page (src/app/page.tsx) uses Tailwind CSS — inconsistency
componentConventions.uiLibrary: None — all UI is hand-rolled with inline styles and SVG

dataFetchingStrategy.approach: Client-side only via useEffect + axios singleton
dataFetchingStrategy.pattern: useEffect on mount with loading boolean via useState

stateManagement.globalState: None — no Zustand, Redux, Jotai, or Context API
stateManagement.serverState: None — no TanStack Query or SWR
stateManagement.urlState: None — no search params or route state used

errorLoadingHandling.loadingPattern: Boolean useState flag; inline conditional rendering or button disabled state
errorLoadingHandling.errorPattern: try/catch with console.error; one domain uses alert() for user-visible errors
errorLoadingHandling.errorBoundary: None — no error.tsx or React Error Boundary anywhere
errorLoadingHandling.loadingUI: None — no loading.tsx, no skeleton components

items.pattern: 'use client' directive on all page files
axios via shared @/lib/api singleton for data fetching
Inline style={{ }} objects as sole styling method
Back-to-main navigation button ('← 메인') using router.push('/')
No testing framework, no test files

items.note: master/page.tsx duplicates its own inline copy instead of importing

auth.detail: No authentication found in any analyzed domain

realTimeFeatures.detail: No WebSocket, SSE, or real-time pattern found

i18n.detail: No i18n library used; all text is hardcoded Korean strings

seoOptimization.detail: Root layout.tsx has a static metadata export; domain pages have no metadata

customSvgVisualization.detail: Hand-rolled SVG components: OpacityGauge (semicircle gauge), InkDonutChart (donut chart) — no chart library

tabBasedMultiEntityCRUD.detail: Single page manages 6 entity types (inks, plates, pads, base_colors, white_refs, recipes) via tab state with a dynamic renderField() form-builder

parallelMethodComparison.detail: Promise.all across 3 complementary-color calculation methods for side-by-side comparison

liveColorPreview.detail: Real-time Lab→RGB preview rendered from state before API call; overlapping circle preview using absolute positioning

cssBarchartVisualization.detail: ΔE distribution shown as inline CSS width-percentage bar chart with transition animation — no chart library

CRITICAL.detail: Defines its own copy instead of importing from @/lib/color — divergence risk if color math changes

CRITICAL.issue: master/page.tsx exceeds 800-line file size guideline significantly
CRITICAL.detail: Single monolithic file violates the <800 line rule; difficult to maintain or test

HIGH.detail: Complete loss of type safety for all form field operations in master domain

HIGH.issue: alert() used for validation and error feedback
HIGH.detail: Blocks the UI thread, cannot be styled, inaccessible — should be replaced with inline error state

HIGH.issue: No error boundary or error.tsx anywhere
HIGH.detail: Unhandled API errors silently fail or leave page in loading state with no user feedback
Defined in both master/page.tsx and InkDonutChart.tsx — single source of truth needed

MEDIUM.issue: No loading skeleton — blank render until data arrives
MEDIUM.detail: All domains show nothing while loading; no skeleton, spinner, or placeholder

MEDIUM.issue: URL state unused — shareable state lost
MEDIUM.detail: Lab values, active tabs, selected methods cannot be bookmarked or shared

MEDIUM.issue: Inline sub-components (LabBox) defined inside page function
MEDIUM.detail: Creates a new function reference on every render; should be extracted to module scope or separate file
Array of ink items in complementary domain has no typed interface
Should be a named constant or config value

MEDIUM.issue: Lab input split into 3 separate useState instead of a single object
MEDIUM.detail: Unnecessary state fragmentation for a naturally grouped value

MEDIUM.issue: No debounce on live preview computation
MEDIUM.detail: labToRgb recalculates on every keystroke with no throttling

LOW.issue: Styling inconsistency: domain pages use inline styles, home page uses Tailwind
LOW.detail: No unified styling strategy across the application

LOW.issue: No accessibility: no ARIA roles, labels, or keyboard navigation
LOW.detail: Interactive elements lack accessible semantics throughout all domains

LOW.issue: console.error with no user-visible feedback on API failures
LOW.detail: Errors are logged but not surfaced to the user in dashboard and master

LOW.issue: No empty state handling distinct from loading state
LOW.detail: null stats vs loading state not visually differentiated

namingConventionsSummary.componentEntryFilePattern: ComponentName.tsx — single file per component, no index.tsx barrel files observed
namingConventionsSummary.componentExportPattern: default export — all pages and components use default export exclusively
namingConventionsSummary.hookNaming: use* prefix convention expected but no custom hooks found in analyzed domains
namingConventionsSummary.apiRoutePatterns: No Next.js API routes exist — all API calls target external backend at NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
namingConventionsSummary.interfaceNaming: PascalCase interface names, often colocated at top of consuming file (e.g., interface DashboardStats, interface Props)

commonUIComponents.name: OpacityGauge
commonUIComponents.description: SVG semicircle gauge for opacity/coverage score visualization

commonUIComponents.name: InkDonutChart
commonUIComponents.description: SVG donut chart for ink category breakdown; also exports inkCategorySlices

utilityFunctions.name: labToRgb
utilityFunctions.description: Converts CIE Lab color values to RGB hex string

utilityFunctions.name: api (axios instance)
utilityFunctions.description: Configured axios instance with baseURL from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL

environmentVariables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
environmentVariables.usage: Base URL for all axios API calls; set in src/lib/api.ts

sharedTypesAndComponents.constantsEnumManagement: Ad-hoc: constants defined inline per file (e.g., CATEGORY_LABELS, CATEGORY_COLORS); no shared constants module

securityAuthPatterns.authenticationApproach: None — no authentication implemented in any analyzed domain
securityAuthPatterns.envVarManagement: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL uses NEXT_PUBLIC_ convention correctly for client-side exposure
securityAuthPatterns.otherSecurityNotes: No sensitive data handling, no auth tokens, no session management observed

performancePatterns.serverComponentUtilization: None — all pages are 'use client'; no RSC usage

cachingStrategy.clientSideCaching: None — plain axios with no cache layer

testingStrategySummary.coverageLevel: 0% — no tests of any kind found

loggingMonitoringStrategy.errorTracking: None — no Sentry, DataDog, or equivalent
loggingMonitoringStrategy.clientLogging: console.error used ad-hoc in catch blocks; not structured

codeQualityTools.lintFormatter: Unknown from source analysis — no .eslintrc, .prettierrc, or biome.json inspected
codeQualityTools.preCommitHooks: Unknown — no .husky or lint-staged config observed
codeQualityTools.ciIntegration: Unknown — no CI config files observed in analyzed domains
codeQualityTools.notes: Code quality tooling configuration was not part of the pass1 domain analysis; requires direct inspection of config files
